mapper.update: UPDATE blog_site_stats SET page_views = page_views + 1 WHERE id = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_site_visitor ( visitor_key, ip_address, user_agent, first_path, first_visit_time, last_visit_time ) VALUES ( #{visitorKey}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{visitPath}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE visitor_key = visitor_key
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT page_views FROM blog_site_stats WHERE id = 1) AS pageViews, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_site_visitor) AS uniqueVisitors
